items.title: Sophie Cunningham erupts from deep as Fever rout Tempo for fourth straight win
items.author: Fieldhouse Files
items.body_excerpt: The Indiana Fever scored a franchise record 113 points in regulation and outscored the Toronto Tempo by 19 points in the second half en route to a 113-91 win — their sixth in a row at Gainbridge Fieldhouse. It was an offensive showcase on Tuesday evening, at least after a…

items.title: Sophie Cunningham has been waiting for nights like this.
items.author: Scott Agness
items.body_excerpt:
Sophie Cunningham has been waiting for nights like this.

The role, the rhythm, the shots — all of it came together as the Fever offense erupted again and continued its best stretch of the season.

On a player who stayed ready, then caught fire: www.fieldhousefiles.com/p/sophie-cun...

media.title: Sophie Cunningham erupts from deep as Fever rout Tempo for fourth straight win
media.description: Cunningham scored a season-high 24 points and matched her career high with six 3-pointers as Indiana posted a franchise-record 113 points in regulation and extended its winning streak.

items.title: Wrote earlier about some Fever numbers regarding fouls, blown leads, and stars. Today:
items.author: Tony East
items.body_excerpt:
Wrote earlier about some Fever numbers regarding fouls, blown leads, and stars. Today:

-18 fouls, 2nd fewest of season. Now 5-0 when that number is under 24
-Built, and held, second-half lead
-In 21 minutes with all three of Mitchell/Clark/Boston, +8

More: www.theixsports.com/features/eve...

items.title: New for CBS Sports: I got to see Kylian Mbappé play in person for the first time and wrote about what it's like to witness bombastic, balletic brilliance alongside more than 80,000 other people.
items.author: Matt Norlander
items.body_excerpt:
New for CBS Sports: I got to see Kylian Mbappé play in person for the first time and wrote about what it's like to witness bombastic, balletic brilliance alongside more than 80,000 other people.

I've officially got the World Cup bug.

media.title: Kylian Mbappé's bombastic, two-goal 2026 World Cup debut sets the tone for France's quest to win it all
media.description: France loudly announced its arrival on Tuesday in New Jersey. Matt Norlander was there and writes what it's like to experience Kylian Mbappé's brilliance in person

items.title: Hollinger POTD Brandon Armstrong. Pepperdine SG was drafted 23rd in 01 by Nj via trade w/HOU. Good college scorer but struggled to score as a pro. Played 108 gms from 01-04 & had 2.2 ppg on .365 FG%. Played in minors & abroad from 04-09.
